## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss blog post progress, website updates, and future collaboration plans between GrowthX and Edin's team.](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog post layout and graphics are ready; content finalization and newsletter integration pending](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Webflow integration page design concepts to be presented tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to continue working with Edin's team at full rate after pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Potential for expanding design services to GrowthX clients and scaling Edin's team](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post and Website Updates

  - [Graphics for the post completed, including featured image and bento grid](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Newsletter integration pending; likely to be embedded at end of posts](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Jason to confirm ARR figures and select team photo for the post](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

### Webflow Integration Page

  - [Edin's team to present design concepts tomorrow, focusing on balancing developer and non-technical user needs](https://fathom.video/share/-YPFn4BD11n3TJyx7NscZbZzCLU5q5kx?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
